body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: MPLS Network Action for Transporting In Situ OAM Data Fields
IANA Registry for the First Nibble Following a Label Stack
Deprecating the Use of Router Alert in LSP Ping
02 - MPLS Data Plane Encapsulation for In-situ OAM Data
